overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing exploration of a military-industrial facility built into a rocky cliff system. The player character moves from outdoor rocky terrain into a tunnel, traverses a long corridor, inspects a utility room, and exits to an outdoor area with a large red industrial door.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain facility entrance with warning barriers

events.description: moving from outdoor rocky cliff into the concrete tunnel entrance
transitioning from bright natural sunlight to shaded tunnel interior

agents.ego_description: walking from the outdoor rocky cliff area toward and into the tunnel entrance marked '04'

entered.detail: tall rock face with patches of green vegetation at the top
black and white striped caution barrier blocking the edge
gray concrete walking surface leading to the tunnel
dark tunnel opening marked with the number 04 on the concrete pillar
illuminated white vertical light fixtures on the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a tunnel entrance built into a rocky cliff, moving from bright outdoor light into the shadow of the facility. Warning barriers and concrete platforms line the path as the tunnel entrance marked '04' comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground industrial corridor with overhead pipes

events.description: continuing straight through the long corridor with consistent pacing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the long underground tunnel with industrial piping overhead and rock walls

entered.detail: large industrial pipes running along the tunnel ceiling
rough exposed rock surface forming the tunnel walls
gray metal barrier with yellow and black caution stripes

segments.scene_description: Moving steadily through the long underground corridor with exposed rock walls and overhead industrial piping. The tunnel is illuminated by vertical light strips and leads deeper into the mountain facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: utility room with industrial pumps and machinery

events.description: turning around in the tunnel to head back toward the entrance
approaching and inspecting the utility room with large industrial pumps

agents.ego_description: turning around in the tunnel and approaching a side utility room to inspect the industrial equipment inside

entered.detail: open doorway revealing industrial machinery inside
large cylindrical tanks and silver pipes inside the utility room
orange maintenance cart with tools and equipment
orange and white traffic cone near the utility room entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns around in the tunnel and approaches a side utility room containing industrial pumps and machinery. After briefly inspecting the equipment, the player turns back toward the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility exit leading to outdoor courtyard

events.description: exiting the tunnel into the bright outdoor courtyard area
emerging from artificial lighting into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking out of the tunnel into a bright outdoor courtyard with a large red industrial door ahead

entered.detail: large red metal blast door with small entrance door built into it
large white industrial cargo container on wheels
dark building structure with horizontal red lighting stripe
green bushes and plants growing on top of the rock walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dim tunnel into bright sunlight, the player emerges into an outdoor courtyard. A large red industrial door dominates the far wall, with a cargo cart and black building visible nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor loading courtyard with red blast door

events.description: approaching the cargo cart and looking around the courtyard

agents.ego_description: exploring the outdoor courtyard, examining the cargo cart and approaching the large red industrial door

entered.detail: scattered metal debris and objects on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: Exploring the outdoor courtyard area, the player moves around the cargo cart and approaches the red industrial door. The surrounding area features high rock walls with vegetation and scattered debris on the concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright rocky exterior into the depths of a mountain facility before emerging back into a sunlit industrial courtyard. It begins by approaching a tunnel entrance marked 04, moving past warning barriers and concrete platforms as the bright outdoor light gives way to the shadows of the cliff. The camera then glides through a long underground corridor defined by exposed rock walls and vertical light strips, briefly diverting into a side utility room to inspect industrial pumps and machinery. As the camera turns back and exits the dim tunnel, the scene opens into a bright outdoor courtyard dominated by a massive red industrial door. The movement concludes by navigating around a cargo cart across a concrete ground scattered with debris, surrounded by high rock walls and sparse vegetation.
